label: Real-time translation
description: Technology that converts spoken or written language to another language almost instantly using neural machine translation models trained on billions of sentence pairs.

label: WebRTC
description: Web Real-Time Communication — an open standard enabling peer-to-peer audio, video and data in browsers without plugins. Used in video calling apps.

label: Neural machine translation
description: A type of AI translation that uses neural networks to translate entire sentences at once, capturing context and nuance better than word-by-word approaches.

label: Multilingual communication
description: Communication between people who speak different languages, enabled by AI translation tools, interpreters, or translation software.
